items.title: Morning opening dhikr
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ، وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna, wa bika amsayna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namutu, wa ilaykan-nushur.
items.translation: O Allah, by Your grace we reach the morning, by Your grace we reach the evening, by Your grace we live and by Your grace we die, and to You is the resurrection.
items.source: Morning/Evening adhkar. IslamQA 217496; Dorar hadith sharh 82744.

items.title: Contentment with Allah, Islam, and the Prophet
items.arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا، وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَبِيًّا
items.transliteration: Raditu billahi Rabban, wa bil-Islami dinan, wa bi Muhammadin sallallahu 'alayhi wa sallama Nabiyyan.
items.translation: I am content with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad, peace be upon him, as my Prophet.
items.source: Morning/Evening adhkar. IslamQA 217496; Dorar hadith YxwUoX1J.

items.title: Protection with the name of Allah
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ، وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
items.transliteration: Bismillahilladhi la yadurru ma'a ismihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama', wa huwa as-Sami'ul-'Alim.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing can harm on earth or in heaven, and He is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.
items.source: Morning/Evening adhkar. IslamQA 217496; Dorar hadith xWhejOi0.

items.title: Tasbih of the morning
items.translation: Glory and praise be to Allah.
